sim_hook: mac datapath compute interval and first-level adder tree activity
notes: Required: rtl cycle traces; MAC output values; activity counters if power is claimed

sim_hook: outlier ratio, route/shift bypass, output-value checker
notes: Required: outlier ratio per layer; golden/RTL output values; route-shift timing

sim_hook: precision mode, packed traffic, MAC throughput, value tolerance
notes: Required: precision mode per layer; packed data width; value tolerance; RTL timing

sim_hook: softmax vector dimension and per-32-lane pipeline cycles
notes: Required: vector dimension; softmax input/output values; module done cycles

sim_hook: activation/weight zero ratio, skipped multiply/add cycles
notes: Required: activation/weight zero ratio; skip counters; RTL timing and values

sim_hook: channel-group bitmap density and group-skip scheduling
notes: Required: bitmap density per channel group; decode cycles; group-skip counters
